title: erysimum clavatum
intro: Erysimum clavatum, also known as dog's kibble or dog's tooth, is a type of flowering plant in the Brassicaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The plant has been reported to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving respiratory issues, and supporting digestive health. Traditionally, Erysimum clavatum is prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and optimal preparation methods.
